model.finance_core.int_invoice_aging.name: int_invoice_aging
model.finance_core.int_invoice_aging.rawCode:
with invoices as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_invoices') }}
)

select
    invoice_id,
    invoice_number,
    customer_id,
    subscription_id,
    invoice_status,
    total,
    issued_at,
    due_at,
    paid_at,
    is_paid,
    days_to_pay,
    case when not is_paid then date_diff('day', due_at, current_date) else null end as days_overdue,
    case
        when is_paid then 'paid'
        when date_diff('day', due_at, current_date) <= 0 then 'current'
        when date_diff('day', due_at, current_date) <= 30 then '1-30'
        when date_diff('day', due_at, current_date) <= 60 then '31-60'
        when date_diff('day', due_at, current_date) <= 90 then '61-90'
        else '90+'
    end as aging_bucket
from invoices

model.finance_core.int_customer_balances.name: int_customer_balances
model.finance_core.int_customer_balances.rawCode:
with invoices as (
    select customer_id, sum(total) as invoiced_total, sum(case when not is_paid then total else 0 end) as outstanding_total
    from {{ ref('stg_invoices') }}
    group by customer_id
),

payments as (
    select customer_id, sum(amount) as paid_total
    from {{ ref('stg_payments') }}
    where payment_status = 'succeeded'
    group by customer_id
),

refunds as (
    select customer_id, sum(amount) as refunded_total
    from {{ ref('stg_refunds') }}
    group by customer_id
)

select
    customers.customer_id,
    coalesce(i.invoiced_total, 0) as invoiced_total,
    coalesce(p.paid_total, 0) as paid_total,
    coalesce(r.refunded_total, 0) as refunded_total,
    coalesce(i.invoiced_total, 0)
        - coalesce(p.paid_total, 0)
        + coalesce(r.refunded_total, 0) as outstanding_balance,
    coalesce(i.outstanding_total, 0) as outstanding_invoice_total
from {{ ref('stg_customers') }} customers
left join invoices i using (customer_id)
left join payments p using (customer_id)
left join refunds r using (customer_id)

model.finance_core.int_mrr_movements.name: int_mrr_movements
model.finance_core.int_mrr_movements.rawCode:
with subs as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_subscriptions') }}
),

plans as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_plans') }}
),

joined as (
    select
        s.subscription_id,
        s.customer_id,
        s.plan_id,
        p.tier,
        p.normalized_monthly_price as mrr,
        s.started_at,
        s.ended_at,
        s.canceled_at,
        s.subscription_status
    from subs s
    left join plans p using (plan_id)
),

new_business as (
    select
        subscription_id,
        customer_id,
        started_at as movement_date,
        'new' as movement_type,
        mrr as mrr_delta
    from joined
),

churn as (
    select
        subscription_id,
        customer_id,
        ended_at as movement_date,
        'churn' as movement_type,
        -mrr as mrr_delta
    from joined
    where ended_at is not null
)

select * from new_business
union all
select * from churn

model.finance_core.int_payment_applicati.name: int_payment_applications
model.finance_core.int_payment_applicati.rawCode:
with payments as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_payments') }}
    where payment_status = 'succeeded'
),

refunds as (
    select payment_id, sum(amount) as total_refunded from {{ ref('stg_refunds') }} group by payment_id
),

invoices as (
    select invoice_id, total from {{ ref('stg_invoices') }}
)

select
    p.payment_id,
    p.invoice_id,
    p.customer_id,
    p.amount as gross_amount,
    coalesce(r.total_refunded, 0) as refunded_amount,
    p.amount - coalesce(r.total_refunded, 0) as net_amount,
    i.total as invoice_total,
    p.payment_method,
    p.processed_at
from payments p
left join refunds r on p.payment_id = r.payment_id
left join invoices i on p.invoice_id = i.invoice_id

    select payment_id, sum(amount) as total_refunded from "finance_core"."main"."stg_refunds" group by payment_id
),

invoices as (
    select invoice_id, total from "finance_core"."main"."stg_invoices"
)

select
    p.payment_id,
    p.invoice_id,
    p.customer_id,
    p.amount as gross_amount,
    coalesce(r.total_refunded, 0) as refunded_amount,
    p.amount - coalesce(r.total_refunded, 0) as net_amount,
    i.total as invoice_total,
    p.payment_method,
    p.processed_at
from payments p
left join refunds r on p.payment_id = r.payment_id
left join invoices i on p.invoice_id = i.invoice_id

model.finance_core.int_subscription_life.name: int_subscription_lifecycle
model.finance_core.int_subscription_life.rawCode:
with subs as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_subscriptions') }}
),

plans as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_plans') }}

invoices as (

    s.started_at,
    s.ended_at,

    s.tenure_days,

        else s.subscription_status
    end as lifecycle_stage
from subs s
left join plans p using (plan_id)

model.finance_core.dim_dates.name: dim_dates
model.finance_core.dim_dates.rawCode:
with date_spine as (
    select cast(range as date) as date_day
    from range(date '2022-01-01', date '2024-12-31', interval '1 day')
)

select
    date_day,
    extract(year from date_day) as year,
    extract(quarter from date_day) as quarter,
    extract(month from date_day) as month,
    extract(week from date_day) as week_of_year,
    extract(day from date_day) as day_of_month,
    extract(dayofweek from date_day) as day_of_week,
    strftime(date_day, '%B') as month_name,
    date_trunc('month', date_day) as month_start,
    date_trunc('quarter', date_day) as quarter_start,
    date_trunc('year', date_day) as year_start,
    case when date_day = date_trunc('month', date_day) + interval '1 month' - interval '1 day' then true else false end as is_month_end
from date_spine

model.finance_core.cohort_retention.rawCode:
with lifecycle as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_subscription_lifecycle') }}
),

cohorts as (
    select
        date_trunc('month', started_at) as cohort_month,
        subscription_id,
        customer_id,
        mrr,
        started_at,
        coalesce(ended_at, current_date) as observation_date
    from lifecycle
)

select
    cohort_month,
    date_trunc('month', observation_date) as as_of_month,

model.finance_core.churn_metrics.name: churn_metrics
model.finance_core.churn_metrics.rawCode:
with lifecycle as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_subscription_lifecycle') }}
),

by_month as (
    select
        date_trunc('month', canceled_at) as churn_month,
        count(*) as churned_subscriptions,
        sum(mrr) as churned_mrr
    from lifecycle
    where canceled_at is not null
    group by date_trunc('month', canceled_at)
),

cohort as (
    select
        date_trunc('month', started_at) as cohort_month,
        count(*) as cohort_size,
        sum(mrr) as cohort_mrr
    from lifecycle
    group by date_trunc('month', started_at)
)

select
    coalesce(c.cohort_month, b.churn_month) as month_start,
    coalesce(c.cohort_size, 0) as new_subscriptions,
    coalesce(b.churned_subscriptions, 0) as churned_subscriptions,
    coalesce(c.cohort_mrr, 0) as new_mrr,
    coalesce(b.churned_mrr, 0) as churned_mrr,
    case
        when c.cohort_mrr > 0 then coalesce(b.churned_mrr, 0) / c.cohort_mrr
    end as gross_mrr_churn_rate
from cohort c
full outer join by_month b on c.cohort_month = b.churn_month

with invoices as (

model.finance_core.int_subscription_plan.rawCode:
{{
  config(materialized='ephemeral')
}}

with subscriptions as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_subscriptions') }}
),

plans as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_plans') }}
),

enriched as (
    select
        s.subscription_id,
        s.customer_id,
        s.plan_id,
        p.plan_name,
        p.tier,
        p.normalized_monthly_price,
        s.started_at,
        s.ended_at,
        s.is_active,
        lag(s.plan_id) over (
            partition by s.customer_id
            order by s.started_at
        ) as previous_plan_id,
        lag(p.normalized_monthly_price) over (
            partition by s.customer_id
            order by s.started_at
        ) as previous_mrr
    from subscriptions s
    left join plans p using (plan_id)
)

select
    *,
    case
        when previous_plan_id is null then 'new'
        when normalized_monthly_price > previous_mrr then 'upgrade'
        when normalized_monthly_price < previous_mrr then 'downgrade'
        else 'lateral'
    end as change_type,
    coalesce(normalized_monthly_price, 0) - coalesce(previous_mrr, 0) as mrr_change
from enriched
